name: site-builder
description: Brief-in, website-out. Scaffolds a dynamic Next.js site from a brief, styled by the vendored UI/UX Pro Max design skills and 21st.dev Magic MCP components, with Framer Motion and Glif-generated visuals. Built for occasional, zero-recall reuse.

magic_api_key.title: 21st.dev Magic API key
magic_api_key.description: API key from https://21st.dev/magic/console. Used by the bundled Magic MCP to generate UI components. Free tier is small; leave empty to skip Magic and rely on the vendored design skills only.

glif_api_token.title: Glif API token
glif_api_token.description: API token from https://glif.app/settings/api-tokens. Used by the bundled Glif MCP to generate site visuals (hero images, illustrations, icons, OG images). Leave empty to skip visual generation and fall back to explicit placeholders.
